title: Cabinet claim evidence revalidation
goal: Connect Cabinet claims to RepoBrief citation ids and freshness/hash checks so stale or broken evidence can be detected without treating Cabinet maps as truth.

acceptance.assertion: Claims can reference RepoBrief citation ids or source ranges with hash/freshness metadata.
A revalidation report distinguishes still-established, stale, missing, changed and unverifiable evidence.
The report does not make Cabinet a RepoBrief producer or RepoBrief a claim-truth oracle.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Cabinet PR #101: bounded claimEvidenceRevalidations in the maintenance report, structured RepoBrief citation/source-range evidence, hash/freshness checks and explicit claim-truth boundary.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t014-claim-links: Maintenance report evidence entries can now be structured as repobrief_citation or repobrief_source_range with ref/sourcePath, citationId, start/end lines, sha256/expectedSha256, generatedAt, freshnessBasis and maxAgeHours.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t014-revalidation: claimEvidenceRevalidations and summary.claimEvidenceRevalidationCounts distinguish still_established, stale, missing, changed and unverifiable evidence.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t014-boundary: Top-level and per-evidence doesNotEstablish fields explicitly preserve claim_truth, repobrief_claim_truth_oracle and cabinet_repobrief_lenskit_producer boundaries.

validation: Cabinet PR #101 GitHub checks passed at head f4e64b0d5c46526bd45dfe0467ac505a50047585: Repository Snapshot Review, Project Cards, Cabinet Maintenance Radar, Ecosystem Map, Validate / Repository Contract, Installer Shadow Test, Secret Scan.
Local: python3 -m unittest discover scripts/tests -> 274 tests OK; expected negative-test stderr line: ERROR: output path escapes repository.
residual_notes: Productive Cabinet claims still need real RepoBrief citation ids from current bundles for end-to-end practical use; PR #101 implements the bounded report surface and tests, not a full claim migration.
